briefdescription.para: Gets or sets the creature's display name.
Gets the creature's current hit points.
Gets a bool value indicating whether the creature is dead.
Gets or sets the maximum total weight of AttackItem instances the creature can carry.
Gets or sets the maximum total weight of DefenceItem instances the creature can carry.
Gets or sets the strategy used to calculate attack damage and defense.
Gets or sets the creature's X‑coordinate in the world.
Gets or sets the creature's Y‑coordinate in the world.

memberdef.argsstring: (string name, int hitPoint=100, int maxAttackWeight=50, int maxDefenceWeight=50)
memberdef.name: Creature

briefdescription.para: Initializes a new instance of the Creature class.

parameterdescription.para: The starting hit points. Default is 100.
The maximum attack weight the creature can carry. Default is 50.
The maximum defence weight the creature can carry. Default is 50.

briefdescription.para: Hook method invoked after a successful hit. Subclasses may override this to implement custom post‑attack behavior.
Hook method invoked before a hit. Subclasses may override this to implement custom pre‑attack behavior.

parameterdescription.para: The creature that will be hit.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the outgoing damage using the configured hit strategy.
Calculates the total defence using the configured strategy.
Performs an attack on the specified target.

detaileddescription.para:
This method defines the attack sequence:
Invoke a customizable hook (BeforeHit).
Calculate damage using the active hit strategy.
Apply the damage to the target.
Invoke a customizable hook (AfterHit).

briefdescription.para: Registers an observer that will be notified when the creature is hit or dies.
Removes a previously registered observer.
Calculates the total defence value from all equipped defence items.
Applies incoming damage to the creature, reduced by all equipped defence items.
Attempts to add an attack item to the creature's inventory.

simplesect.para: true if the item was added successfully; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Adds a defence item to the creature's inventory.

simplesect.para: true if the item was added successfully; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Checks the total weight of all currently equipped attack items.

simplesect.para: The total weight of attack items.

briefdescription.para: Checks the total weight of all currently equipped defence items.

simplesect.para: The total weight of defence items.

briefdescription.para: Attempts to loot a WorldObject. If the object is lootable and is an attack or defence item, it is added to the creature's inventory.
Returns a string representation of the creature, including name, hit points, and world position.
Represents a creature in the game world and serves as the base class for all creature types. Implements Template, Observer, and Strategy design patterns.

detaileddescription.para: Template Method: The PerformHit method defines the attack flow, while subclasses may override AfterHit to customize post‑attack behavior.
Strategy: Damage calculation is delegated to an IStrategy implementation, allowing creatures to change combat behavior dynamically.
Observer: External observers can subscribe to hit and death events using RegisterObserver and RemoveObserver.
